ss, powerful
and opulent. If she is weak, the above results will be reversed.
If she is in the 2nd house, he becomes very rich, enjoys sensual
pleasures, is defective in some limb, and of soft speech. He is
also powerful, honoured by women and satisfied with a little.
In the 3rd she makes one very miserly, possessed of brothers,
passion, strength and valour, a tale-bearer, merciless and
cunning. When she is in he 4th, he becomes happy,
enjoying pleasues, charitable and endowed with friends vehicles
and fame. He will also eat sumptuous meals, be polite, and
fond of women. When she is in the 5th house, he will have good
sons, wisdom, gentle gait, wife, valour, ministership and wealth
through great exertion. In the 6th she makes one short-hved,
not intelligent, suffer from stomach complaint, lazy, poor, have
many enemies and humiliation. He will also curb his brothers
and other kinsmen. In the 7th she makes one of amiahle looks,
